form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (21.23) when seventh over 340m at this track in a Grade 5. Has performed well off the draw with a win and four places from seven starts. Makes appeal on best.

form.formComment: Placed last time (23.63) at Dubbo in a Grade 5, finishing third and beaten 7 lengths. Has never missed the placings from four starts off this box. Looks well placed and should feature.

form.formComment: Returns from a three-and-a-half months spell after being tipped out on the back of a eighth (27.11) over 431m at this track. Has had two fresh up runs and has recorded the one placing. Sure to make her presence felt.
